name: AI Dinner Planner & Nutrient Tracker
description: Weekly dinner plans with calorie, protein, carbohydrate, and fat proportions. Supports High Protein, Keto, Mediterranean, Diabetic, Vegetarian, Vegan, and Pescatarian diets. Generates a shopping list in advance, lets users track daily eating, view historical caloric/protein charts, specify custom dinners, and get AI meal suggestions.
